data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the last lifecycle-event cursor.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the last lifecycle-event cursor for replay/recovery workflows. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data regarding the existence or status of this cursor. The only related evidence pertains to booking and financial outputs, which do not address the specific requirement for the lifecycle-event cursor.
gaps: No evidence of the last lifecycle-event cursor for replay/recovery workflows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and status of the last lifecycle-event cursor.
